name: Landing

task.description: Build a long marketing landing page for a SaaS 'FlowState' at 1920px wide with many aligned sections stacked vertically: (1) sticky top nav (logo left; links Product, Pricing, Docs, Blog center; 'Sign in' + 'Get started' right); (2) hero (centered headline, subhead, two CTAs, a product screenshot placeholder); (3) a logos strip of 5 evenly-spaced grayscale customer-logo placeholders; (4) a 3-column features row (icon + title + 2-line description), equal width; (5) a 2-column 'how it works' alternating row (text + image); (6) a testimonial block (quote, author, avatar); (7) a 3-tier pricing teaser (Free, Pro, Team) equal-width cards; (8) an FAQ of 4 items; (9) a footer with 4 equal-width link columns and a bottom legal bar. Responsive: at 375px the nav collapses to a hamburger and every multi-column section becomes a single column.
requirements: A sticky top nav has the logo (left), centered links, and right-side auth buttons, all vertically centered
The hero has a centered headline, subhead, two CTA buttons, and a screenshot placeholder
The logos strip shows 5 evenly-spaced logo placeholders aligned on one row
The features row has 3 equal-width columns (icon + title + description) with uniform gutters
The pricing teaser shows 3 equal-width cards (Free, Pro, Team) top-aligned
The footer has 4 equal-width link columns plus a bottom legal bar
All major sections are full-width bands that align to a consistent content max-width / left edge (repetition)
On desktop nothing overflows horizontally and no two sections overlap vertically
At 375px the nav collapses to a hamburger
At 375px every multi-column section (features, how-it-works, pricing, footer) becomes a single column
One consistent accent color is reused across CTAs, active nav, and pricing highlight

How It Works

Connect Your Tools

Integrate FlowState with your existing workflow tools and platforms. Our smart connectors automatically sync data and create unified workflows across all your applications, eliminating silos and reducing manual work.

Integration Diagram
Automation Interface

Automate Everything

Set up intelligent automation rules that trigger based on your team's activities. From task assignments to status updates, FlowState handles the routine work so your team can focus on what matters most.

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can I set up FlowState for my team? +
Most teams are up and running within 15 minutes. Our guided onboarding process walks you through connecting your tools and setting up your first automated workflows.
What integrations are available? +
FlowState integrates with over 200 popular tools including Slack, Jira, GitHub, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and many more. We also provide REST APIs for custom integrations.
Is my data secure with FlowState? +
Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade security with SOC 2 Type II compliance, end-to-end encryption, and regular security audits. Your data is stored in secure, geographically distributed data centers.
Can I cancel my subscription anytime? +
Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no cancellation fees. Your account will remain active until the end of your current billing period, and you can export all your data.

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can I get started with FlowState? +
You can be up and running in under 5 minutes. Simply sign up, invite your team, and start building your first workflow with our intuitive drag-and-drop interface.
Do you offer integrations with other tools? +
Yes! FlowState integrates with over 100 popular tools including Slack, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and many more through our API and Zapier connections.
Is my data secure with FlowState? +
Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade security with AES-256 encryption, SOC 2 Type II compliance, and regular security audits. Your data is hosted on secure AWS infrastructure.
Can I cancel my subscription anytime? +
Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no cancellation fees. You'll continue to have access to your account until the end of your current billing period.
